company: Undisclosed employer Stadt Zürich Save Apply 4 days ago Sachbearbeiter*in StammdatenApply Save 12 March 2026 60 – 100% Temporary GermanStadt Zürich About the job Befristete Stelle Finanzverwaltung Zur Verstärkung des Teams für die Stammdatenpflege suchen wir Sie per sofort oder nach Vereinbarung. Aufgaben Sie pflegen und bereinigen Stammdaten unserer Geschäftspartner*innen im SAP-Betriebssysteminsbesondere von Kreditoren und Debitoren Ergänzend führen Sie eigenständig den Schalterdienst und die dazugehörigen Kassentransaktionen durchSie arbeiten mit bei internen Projekten der Stadtkasse Profil Eine abgeschlossene kaufmännische Berufslehrevon Vorteil oder ein Studiumoder in Ausbildung Sehr gute MS-Office-Kenntnisse und ausgeprägte digitale Affinität sowie technisches Flair Erfahrung im Umgang mit verschiedenen Anspruchsgruppen sowie durchsetzungsfähige Persönlichkeit Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift, gute mündliche Kommunikation in Englisch, weitere Sprachkenntnisse von Vorteil SAP oder Kenntnisse der Stammdatenverwaltungsind von Vorteil Wir bieten Eine verantwortungsvolle, interessante und abwechslungsreiche Aufgabe. Wir bieten attraktive Anstellungsbedingungen sowie einen zentral gelegenen -und modernen Arbeitsplatz im Zentrum von Zürich. Über uns Finanzverwaltung klingt langweilig? - Ist es aber nicht. Die Finanzverwaltung ist eine Dienstabteilung des Finanzdepartements. Zu den Hauptaufgaben der Finanzverwaltung zählen die Erstellung des gesamtstädtischen Budgets und der Finanzplanung, die Führung der gesamtstädtischen Buchhaltung, der Jahresrechnung, sowie die Sicherstellung der Liquidität, die Beschaffung von Mitteln am Geld- und Kapitalmarkt, die Abwicklung des gesamtstädtischen Zahlungsverkehrs, das Beschaffungswesen sowie das Risiko- und Versicherungsmanagement. Als Teil der Tresorerie ist die Stadtkasse für den Bargeldverkehr und die Stammdatenpflege in SAP zuständig und befindet sich im Stadthaus. Interessiert? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Online-Bewerbung. Für weitere Informationen steht Ihnen Ronnie Müller, Abteilungsleiter Tresorerie, gerne zur Verfügung, Telefon: +41 44 412 32 68. Referenz-Nr.: 49511

company: Undisclosed employer Baden Save Apply Last week Service Business Project Manager S/4HANA80-100% Apply Save 23 March 2026 80 – 100% Permanent position EnglishBaden Introduction Accelleron is accelerating sustainability in the marine and energy industries as a global technology leader in turbocharging, fuel injection, and digital solutions for heavy-duty applications. Building on a heritage of over 100 years as a trusted industry partner, the company serves customers in more than 100 locations in over 50 countries. Accelleron’s 3,000 employees are continuously innovating to deliver best-in-class products, services, and solutions that are mission-critical for the energy transition. You will join a team of experts in an exciting international environment, committed to excellence and innovation. Together, we support our customers in driving the transition toward sustainable industries with cutting-edge technology, deep expertise, and smart solutions. At Accelleron, we foster diversity and inclusion, welcoming and celebrating individual differences as a source of strength. Show more About the job As the Service Business Project Manager S/4HANA, you drive and coordinate cross-functional service operations and ERP initiatives within the S/4HANA FLASH Team and the broader Global Service Operations landscape. You lead and support ERP and process improvement projects across service operations, including regulatory and localization initiatives such as tax reforms, company code implementations, and E-Invoicing rollouts, working closely with Global Process Ownersand application teams. As the global owner of Service S/4HANA User Access Managementgovernance, you establish and continuously improve user access and test management practices, supporting ongoing transformation and remediation initiatives. In this role, you report to the Team Lead & Service Business Process Manager, Global Service Operations, and are part of the S/4HANA FLASH Team. The position is based in Baden, Switzerland. Your Responsibilities: S/4HANA Project Management & E-Invoicing Enablement Lead small- to medium-sized continuous improvement, localization, and regulatory projects within the global Service Operations S/4HANA environment. Support cross-functional ERP initiatives such as tax reforms, organizational changes, and company code implementations, ensuring successful operational integration and adoption. Support the operational rollout, integration, and stabilization of E-Invoicing processes, primarily within the Order-to-Cash area, in alignment with the strategy and solutions defined by the Global E-Invoicing & Digital Tax Manager. Coordinate rollout activities with countries and stakeholders, including readiness tracking, testing coordination, and post-go-live follow-up in collaboration with IT, Global Process Owners, and business stakeholders. Identify improvement opportunities across service processes and S/4HANA operations in collaboration with GPOs, drive related change requests, and contribute to sustainable process optimization. Collaborate closely with Global Process Owners, Group Tax, Finance, IT and the service network to ensure alignment with global standards and effective operational adoption. User Access & Test Management Governance Own, maintain, and continuously improve User Access Management processes for the Service SAP S/4HANA landscape, ensuring adherence to defined procedures, security policies, and audit requirements. Define, implement, and govern the global User Access Management operating model for Service S/4HANA. Coordinate user role governance and access-related activities across the Service organization, ensuring consistent execution and timely resolution of access issues. Define, oversee, and continuously improve an audit-compliant test management framework, including user acceptance testing and regression testing for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud releases. Define and monitor relevant KPIs, drive remediation actions based on audit findings and operational feedback and identify continuous improvement opportunities. Functionally manage test coordination and user access management specialists within the central operations team, ensuring effective delivery, governance, and knowledge sharing. Your Background: University degree or equivalent higher education in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field. Proven experience in project management, operational excellence, process improvement, and/or Lean Six Sigma methodologies. Strong ERP knowledge of SAP S/4HANA, with hands-on experience in SD, PS, and EPPM; experience with Microsoft CRM is an advantage. Experience in SAP S/4HANA User Access Management, including role design, authorization concepts, and access governance implementation. Strong analytical and structured working approach, with the ability to drive topics independently while collaborating effectively within cross-functional teams. Experience working with senior stakeholders across multiple countries and communicating effectively at all organizational levels. Experience in commercial operations, service business support, or service coordination is an advantage. International business experience and strong intercultural competence. Language skills: English; German. Willingness to travel internationally. Your Benefits: Canteen Childcare Modern office, smart working Flexible working model Attractive holiday plan Employee assistance program We look forward to receiving your application. If you want to discover more about Accelleron, take another look at our website accelleron.com . Accelleron Data Privacy Statement: accelleron.com/privacy-notice/candidate Job Family Group: Project Execution

Is this helpful? About the job VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional Statutory Senior Analyst Record to Report to join our Accounting team based in Stabio Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As a Statutory Senior Analyst, your responsibility lies in ensuring the accuracy and timely execution of activities assigned within the RTR team. This involves verifying data accuracy and ensuring compliance with Local GAAP accounting standards. The role supports period-end close, General Ledger accuracy, balance sheet integrity and financial reporting in compliance with US GAAP and statutory accounting requirements, working closely with the RTR Statutory Manager, internal stakeholders and outsourced service providers. In particular, the role will support the Statutory Record to Report team and the outsourcing provider with the following activities. Support the RTR team for all the statutory work activities for VF organizations, the outsourcing provider and the audit teams. Support the preparation and the compliance to local GAAP of the statutory reporting for the main fiscal organizations in EMEA. Support the preparation and the compliance to local GAAP of the statutory Swiss Gaap FER Financials, in compliance with Pillar II requirements. Support the Global Tax & Treasury team with all the information needed to prepare tax calculations. Monitor the year-closing calendar for all the EMEA countries to ensure that statutory deadlines for filing statutory financial statement and tax declarations are respected. Work closely with the RTR team to ensure alignment between US GAAP and local statutory accounting Skills for Success: The ideal candidate will possess the following qualifications and skills: Educational Background: master’s degree in accounting Professional Experience: At least 2-4 years of experience in Record To Report Processesor experience in public accounting. Experience in an international setting is preferred. Skilled in: Financial Statement Accounting FundamentalsLanguage Proficiency: Fluency in English is essentialTeamwork and Diversity: Enthusiastic about working and socializing in a diverse, inclusive, and multicultural environment. Personal Attributes: Proactive, meticulous, and reliable with a positive mindset and a keen desire to learn and grow professionally. A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together. Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives 50% discount on all VF brands Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks. Based at our sites in Marin, we are currently looking for a: SAP FICO Functional Engineer Reporting to the Global IT Manager, this role is ideal for a professional with a strong foundation in financial processes and SAP configuration, looking to grow within a dynamic and supportive environment. Provide functional support and troubleshoot issues related to SAP FICO modules. Collaboration, training & documentation Collaborate closely with SAP experts from other fieldsto ensure end-to-end process integration. Train business users and key users, ensuring adoption of new functionalities and best practices. Produce and maintain high-quality functional documentation, including process flows, configuration documentation, and user guides. Experience with implementations, upgrades, or support projects in SAP S/4HANA is a strong advantage. Strong understanding of financial processes such as general ledger, accounts payable/receivable, asset accounting, and cost controlling. Experience in SAP configuration and customization of financial modules. Ability to analyze business requirements and translate them into SAP solutions. Experience working with cross-functional SAP modules such as SAP MM and SAP SD is a plus. Excellent problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills. Fluent in English and French. SAP certification in FICO or related areas is considered an asset. Entry date : To be disussed Activity rate : 100% Performance, Innovation, Trust, Respect and Ethics are our core values. company: Noventa AG Diepoldsau Save Apply 2 years ago Apprenticeships in the Rhine Valley – Noventa AG Apply Save 06 January 2024 100% Permanent position Diepoldsau About the job Do you want to complete an exciting apprenticeship with a professional future? We are looking for young talents who are motivated to shape their future and make a difference. An apprenticeship in the industry opens the way to a wide range of attractive career paths. At our locations in Diepoldsau and Widnau, we train young motivated people to become qualified specialists. At Noventa, we pay attention to equality and offer girls equally attractive starting opportunities as boys. We see the training of apprentices as a gain for our company and offer interesting career and further education opportunities after successful completion. New dates are in planning. We ask for a little patience. 2 Career visitFrom the first secondary school level, we offer a career visit of our apprenticeship professions. During half a day, you can find out if the profession meets your expectations and is suitable for you. Our specialists will give you a closer look at everyday work and answer your questions. A career visit with us is non-binding. This means that no tests are conducted, you do not need to bring any certificates, and there is no assessment on our part. This only happens during an application internship. As soon as you have completed the Stellwerk check, there is the possibility for a multi-day application internship. During this, you can experience the desired profession up close. Under the guidance of trainers, you will perform specific tasks and briefly step into the role of an apprentice. Through these valuable experiences, a definitive decision for the right career choice can be made. For an application internship, we need your application as described: Application letter stating your motivation for the chosen profession Complete resume with photo All certificate copies from secondary school Information about previously attended trial apprenticeshipsIn order to receive a broadly based decision-making basis in addition to the application, we will conduct an aptitude assessment with you during the application internship. Various general tasksas well as job-related tasks will need to be solved. “We turn good ideas into successful products and create enthusiastic customers.” Committed to this principle, we design and develop innovative products for various industries on behalf of our customers. Around 180 employees at the headquarters in Diepoldsau are passionately committed to solutions that convince and provide added value. Noventa Tooling AG “First-class tools and first-class support from a single source.” Noventa Tooling offers high-quality services in toolmaking and mechanical processing in Widnau. Experienced specialists handle demanding projects from design to series production. Customers in Switzerland and abroad trust our expertise, reliability, and Swiss precision work.

company: Noventa AG Diepoldsau Save Apply 2 years ago Apprenticeships in the Rhine Valley – Noventa AG Apply Save 06 January 2024 100% Permanent position Diepoldsau Job summary Hide Join Noventa for an exciting apprenticeship in a dynamic industry. Tasks Shape your future with valuable hands-on experience in various roles. Participate in job shadowing to explore career options confidently. Engage in a practical application during a tailored internship. Skills Open to motivated young talents eager for professional growth. Strong interest in technical fields and problem-solving. Ability to work collaboratively and learn quickly. Is this helpful? About the job Do you want to complete an exciting apprenticeship with a professional future? We are looking for young talents who are motivated to shape their future and make a difference. An apprenticeship in the industry opens the way to a wide range of attractive career paths. At our locations in Diepoldsau and Widnau, we train young motivated people to become qualified specialists. At Noventa, we pay attention to equality and offer girls equally attractive starting opportunities as boys. We see the training of apprentices as a gain for our company and offer interesting career and further education opportunities after successful completion. New dates are in planning. We ask for a little patience. 2 Career visitFrom the first secondary school level, we offer a career visit of our apprenticeship professions. During half a day, you can find out if the profession meets your expectations and is suitable for you. Our specialists will give you a closer look at everyday work and answer your questions. A career visit with us is non-binding. This means that no tests are conducted, you do not need to bring any certificates, and there is no assessment on our part. This only happens during an application internship. As soon as you have completed the Stellwerk check, there is the possibility for a multi-day application internship. During this, you can experience the desired profession up close. Under the guidance of trainers, you will perform specific tasks and briefly step into the role of an apprentice. Through these valuable experiences, a definitive decision for the right career choice can be made. For an application internship, we need your application as described: Application letter stating your motivation for the chosen profession Complete resume with photo All certificate copies from secondary school Information about previously attended trial apprenticeshipsIn order to receive a broadly based decision-making basis in addition to the application, we will conduct an aptitude assessment with you during the application internship. Various general tasksas well as job-related tasks will need to be solved. “We turn good ideas into successful products and create enthusiastic customers.” Committed to this principle, we design and develop innovative products for various industries on behalf of our customers. Around 180 employees at the headquarters in Diepoldsau are passionately committed to solutions that convince and provide added value. Noventa Tooling AG “First-class tools and first-class support from a single source.” Noventa Tooling offers high-quality services in toolmaking and mechanical processing in Widnau. Experienced specialists handle demanding projects from design to series production. Customers in Switzerland and abroad trust our expertise, reliability, and Swiss precision work.

company: Deloitte Basel, Geneva, Zurich Save Apply 3 quarters ago Senior Consultant - Treasury Advisory Apply Save 25 August 2025 100% Basel, Geneva, Zurich About the job Basic information Business line Technology & Transformation City Basel, Geneva, Zurich Experience level Experienced Working time percentage 80% - 100% Date published 06-Jan-2026 Req # 19135 Job description Location: Zurich, Basel, Geneva Working time percentage: 80% - 100% You bring ambition, we provide opportunities Our Treasury Advisory practice supports customers to solve complex Treasury problems ranging from strategy development, policy enhancements and process optimisation to system implementations, using deep Treasury process and technology expertise. The Treasury Advisory team delivers treasury focussed transformation programmes based on a holistic process design approach, implemented using cutting edge solutions and technology. We partner with global technology providers and combine their tools with our proven expertise to offer effective solutions to our clients. How you can make an impact Your responsibilities will comprise of the following: Support the implementation of treasury management systems, such as SAP TMS / Kyriba / FIS and others Support large SAP S/4HANA transformation programs by leading the treasury workstream Execute the delivery of Treasury Advisory projects involving analysis of treasury operating models, optimising treasury guidelines and policies, optimising banking, cash and payment processes and solutions, implementing in-house banking and payment factory solutions, and related process improvements. Support in Treasury Health Check / Review / Internal Audit engagements to help clients assess and benchmark their Treasury organisation, processes and systems with market best practices In addition to delivering projects, you will be a key member of the Treasury Advisory team, responsibilities include: Support in facilitating Treasury conferences, workshops and customer focused events Manage Engagement Delivery and present project deliverables to clientmanagement Generate Leads by engaging with clients within the Swiss market and within the wider European market by collaborating with other Treasury experts within the Deloitte network Lead and Coach junior team members in the team Who we are looking for Subject Matter Expertise in Corporate Treasury processes and systemsExperience in the design and implementation of Treasury Management Systems, e.g.: Implementation experience in Kyriba or least one other treasury systemKnowledge in one or more SAP modules in the area of TreasuryExperience in the Swiss market with a network of fellow Treasury professionals Consulting experience and analytical and design thinking with a zeal for problem solving A passion for exchanging knowledge and ideas with your colleagues Positivity and enthusiasm, with an eagerness to learn and build a robust career in Treasury consulting Strong Written and Oral communication skills Fluent English and German language skills Your team Our Treasury Advisory team belongs to the wider Finance Transformation practice and is committed to helping clients transform their Finance organization by designing and implementing solutions in enterprise, finance and supply chain, treasury transformations, incorporating advanced technology applications such as artificial intelligence and IoT. The Treasury Advisory practice also works closely with the wider Deloitte Treasury network, leveraging deep expertise and market insights from across the globe. Most engagements involve international teams with SMEs and consultants working as one team and helping clients achieve their objectives. Careers at Deloitte. Choose your impact. At Deloitte, your ideas create impact and spark meaningful change for our clients, people and society. Your unique expertise, background and perspective helps us find new ways into the most complex challenges so we can brighten the futures of those our work affects. At Deloitte, you can build a career that inspires and energises you. At Deloitte, you can choose your impact. In Switzerland, we provide industry-specific services in the areas of Audit & Assurance, Tax & Legal, Strategy, Risk & Transactions Advisory, and Technology & Transformation. With close to 3,000 employees at six locations, we serve companies and organisations of all sizes in all industry sectors. We offer meaningful and challenging work, an inclusive and supportive environment where you can be your best self and where you will never stop growing. Be part of a sustainable future! Tasks Develop and validate a hydraulic rubber-to-metal spring for bogies. Support prototype production and laboratory testing for suspension components. Engage in ongoing projects focused on railway mobility solutions. Skills Students with interest in FEA calculation and experimental validation. Proactive mindset and willingness to shape project focus. Fluency in English is a plus; German or French also welcome. Is this helpful? About the job Masters Student - Internship 1 1Apply now » Date: 15 Apr 2026 Location: Zurich, CH Company: Alstom Req ID:506180 Leading societies to a low carbon future, Alstom develops and markets mobility solutions that provide the sustainable foundations for the future of transportation. Our product portfolio ranges from high-speed trains, metros, monorail, and trams to integrated systems, customised services, infrastructure, signalling and digital mobility solutions. Joining us means joining a caring, responsible, and innovative company where more than 70,000 people lead the way to greener and smarter mobility, worldwide. Internship Development and validation of a hydraulic rubber-to-metal spring Project overview The main goal of the project is the development of a hydraulic rubber-to-metal spring to be used in railway bogies. The position is located at ALSTOMAG in Zürich-Oerlikon. The project can be executed as an internship and/or Master’s thesis, depending on the candidate’s focus and preferences. Context In railway vehicles, suspension components are used in the bogie to ensure a safe and comfortable ride, while helping the vehicle negotiate track irregularities and curves. These functions are commonly realized through the use of rubber-to-metal parts, air springs, coil springs and anti-roll bars. When active suspension systems are used, the state of the art is to use hydraulic cylinders as actuators. However, conventional actuators present a number of disadvantages such as mechanical complexity, high production and maintenance cost and the potential for wear and leakage. It is therefore desirable to develop an actuator solution based on rubber-to-metal parts which are free of maintenance throughout their design life. Possible topics / Focus The focus of the project can be adapted depending on the student’s interests and skills to include: Development of rubber-to-metals part including concept design, 3D modelling, FEA calculation and test definition System design of active suspension and levelling systems Attend and support prototype production and laboratory testing In addition, as part of the internship, the candidate will have the opportunity to work on various topics related to bogie and suspension design in ongoing rolling stock projects, such as: Development and calculation of rubber-to-metal parts and other suspension parts Resolution of field issues with various suspension components Testing and validation of FEA and fatigue calculation tools Required skills Interest in FEA calculation Interest in experimental validation Basic knowledge of meshing, FEA simulations and/or fatigue of materials is beneficial Independent, pro-active mindset and willingness to actively participate in shaping the project focus Working language can be German, English or French. Fluency in Englishis an advantage. What we offer Hands-on project which is solving real-life problems in the industrial environment of a technology-leading company International environment and possibility to get to know the industry by visiting suppliers, test laboratories, production sites, maintenance facilities and on-track tests. Opportunity to work on serial parts used in live contracts Work in a small, dynamic and international team of skilled experts Place of work: Zürich-Oerlikon Start: By arrangement, overall duration 6 months Application: Please send your application to Brigitte Dolnicek Alstom is the leading company in the mobility sector, solving the most interesting challenges for tomorrow’s mobility. That’s why we value inquisitive and innovative people who are passionate about working together to reinvent mobility, making it smarter and more sustainable. Day after day, we are building an agile, inclusive and responsible culture, where a diverse group of people are offered opportunities to learn, grow and advance in their careers, with options across functions and geographic locations. Are you ready to join a truly international community of great people on a challenging journey with a tangible impact and purpose? Equal opportunity statement: Alstom is an equal opportunity employer committed to creating an inclusive working environment where all our employees are encouraged to reach their full potential, and individual differences are valued and respected. All qualified applicants are considered for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, national origin, disability status, or any other characteristic protected by local law. About the job PROFESSIONAL CLIENT ADVISOR Supporting professional clients in the development of their activity Do you have an economic and commercial mindset? As a professional client advisor, you are responsible for a portfolio of craftsmen, very small businesses, and liberal professions within a geographic area. You are their banking partner and support them in the development of their professional activity. If you know how to read a balance sheet, study a financing request, trigger a cash advance, etc., this job is made for you! Your missions You are committed to developing customer satisfaction and loyalty. To do this, you: Advise clients and prospects on the products and services best suited to their needs. Actively contribute to the development of the business base. Develop a perfect knowledge of your client portfolio through listening and the management and analysis tools provided. Manage risks for the bank and clients and act in compliance with the rules. THE ADVANTAGES OF THE JOB My job is to support small businesses, including VSBs, craftsmen, merchants, and liberal professions, in absolutely all aspects of the relationship. So, it will be about supporting them in financing, also in payment solutions like POS terminals, but not only. We also do a lot of protection and insurance, such as property insurance. And my job is really to help them develop their company. My clients are very diverse, so no day is the same, which allows me to be constantly challenged on completely different topics and also allows us to position ourselves as experts on absolutely all aspects of the client relationship. And that is a huge advantage at SG. The key skill to be a professional client advisor is really to love client relationships, because we are in contact with them every day and we must do our best to satisfy them. And in addition to that, it is very enriching on a human level. When I arrived at SG, I was very pleasantly surprised by the training aspect offered. At the beginning of my position, I had some difficulties on a particular subject which was insurance. So I talked to my manager who invited a specialist on the subject to train me. And I really found it great to be able to count on the managerial side and the training offered by the group. My first client at SG, I will always remember, was an Iranian caterer who needed financing to carry out work in his new premises. And I managed to get him the financing. So, as a thank you, he invited me to see the final result in his premises. The little cherry on the cake was that I was able to attend the arrival of the first clients in this commercial space where the result was really very beautiful. And all this allows us to realize that we are useful every day for our clients. Even though I travel a lot to see my clients, I still work in the branch and so I have all my colleagues who are in the branch with me. This allows us in particular to share little tips on client files while respecting confidentiality, of course. And also, it allows us to have a very good working atmosphere by having lunches together.
